zh.Kirkwall Castle, Kirkwall, Orkney Island: 蘇格蘭奧可尼吉可瓦爾
zh.Kirkwall, Orkney, Scotland: 蘇格蘭奧可尼吉可瓦爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir David Menzies於1377年出生在蘇格蘭培爾維姆時，他的父親Chief Sir Robert de Menzies24歲，母親Jean Atholia23歲。他於1409年與Lady Marjory Sinclair of Roslyn Castle在蘇格蘭培爾維姆結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1449年在蘇格蘭奧可尼吉可瓦爾享年72歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭奧可尼吉可瓦爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir David Menzies于1377年出生在苏格兰培爾維姆时，他的父亲Chief Sir Robert de Menzies24岁，母亲Jean Atholia23岁。他于1409年与Lady Marjory Sinclair of Roslyn Castle在苏格兰培爾維姆结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1449年在苏格兰奧可尼吉可瓦爾享年72岁，埋葬在苏格兰奧可尼吉可瓦爾。

nameMeanings.name: Menzies
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: variant of Manners , in which the z was originally the Middle English letter ʒ (yogh), representing a sound similar to modern English y. The surname is pronounced Meenyus or Minyas in Scotland. The name was brought to Scotland in the 12th or 13th century by a family of Norman knights. It appears that the name was re-interpreted in Gaelic as containing a personal name, and for variants ending -s there is a possibility of confusion with McManus . See also McMinn .

variants.name: Minges
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Gunter, Kurt.
Altered form of Scottish   Menzies  , reflecting the traditional Scottish pronunciation of that name.

variants.name: Mingus
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Menzies  , which is traditionallypronounced ‘mingiz’.

variants.name: Manners
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mesnières-en-Bray in Seine-Maritime, recorded in the 13th century as Maneria, a derivative of Latin manere ‘to remain, abide, reside’. See also Menzies .

variants.name: McMinn
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Méinn ‘son of Méinn’, a Gaelic interpretation of Menzies as a relationship surname.

nameMeanings.name: David
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the greatest of all the kings of Israel, whose history is recounted with great vividness in the first and second books of Samuel and elsewhere. As a boy he killed the giant Philistine Goliath with his slingshot. As king of Judah, and later of all Israel, he expanded the power of the Israelites and established the security of their kingdom. He was also noted as a poet, many of the Psalms being attributed to him. The Hebrew derivation of the name is uncertain; it is said by some to represent a nursery word meaning ‘darling’. It is a very popular Jewish name, but is almost equally common among Gentiles in the English-speaking world. It is particularly common in Wales and Scotland, having been borne by the patron saint of Wales (  see  Dewi   ) and by two medieval kings of Scotland.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir David Menzies was born in 1377, in Weem, Perthshire, Scotland, his father, Chief Sir Robert de Menzies, was 24 and his mother, Jean Atholia, was 23. He married Lady Marjory Sinclair of Roslyn Castle in 1409, in Weem, Perthshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1449, in Kirkwall, Orkney, Scotland, at the age of 72, and was buried in Kirkwall, Orkney, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir David Menzies est né en 1377, à Weem, Perthshire, Écosse, son père, Chief Sir Robert de Menzies, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Jean Atholia, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Lady Marjory Sinclair of Roslyn Castle en 1409, à Weem, Perthshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1449, à Kirkwall, Orkney, Écosse, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à Kirkwall, Orkney, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir David Menzies 1377 in Weem, Perthshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Chief Sir Robert de Menzies 24 und seine Mutter Jean Atholia 23. Er hat 1409 in Weem, Perthshire, Scotland Lady Marjory Sinclair of Roslyn Castle geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1449 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Kirkwall, Orkney, Scotland und wurde in Kirkwall, Orkney, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir David Menzies è nato il nel 1377 nel Weem, Perthshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Chief Sir Robert de Menzies, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Jean Atholia, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Lady Marjory Sinclair of Roslyn Castle nel 1409, nel Weem, Perthshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1449, nel Kirkwall, Orkney, Scotland, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolto a Kirkwall, Orkney, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir David Menziesが1377年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアウィームで生まれた時，父Chief Sir Robert de Menziesは24歳，母Jean Atholiaは23歳であった。1409年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアウィームでLady Marjory Sinclair of Roslyn Castleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1449年にスコットランドオルクニーキルクワルで72歳で死去し，スコットランドオルクニーキルクワルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir David Menzies(이)가 1377년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 위에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Chief Sir Robert de Menzies(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Jean Atholia(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1409년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 위에서 Lady Marjory Sinclair of Roslyn Castle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1449년 스컷랜드 르니 커k월에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 르니 커k월에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir David Menzies nasceu em 1377, em Weem, Perthshire, Scotland, seu pai, Chief Sir Robert de Menzies, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Jean Atholia, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Marjory Sinclair of Roslyn Castle em 1409, em Weem, Perthshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1449, em Kirkwall, Orkney, Scotland, com 72 anos, e foi sepultado em Kirkwall, Orkney, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir David Menzies родился в 1377 г. в местности вим, пиртшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Chief Sir Robert de Menzies было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Jean Atholia, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Marjory Sinclair of Roslyn Castle в 1409 г. в местности вим, пиртшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1449 г. в местности кирквалл, орни, Шотландия в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности кирквалл, орни, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir David Menzies nació en 1377, en Weem, Perthshire, Scotland, su papá, Chief Sir Robert de Menzies, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Jean Atholia, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Lady Marjory Sinclair of Roslyn Castle en 1409, en Weem, Perthshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1449, en Kirkwall, Orkney, Scotland, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultado en Kirkwall, Orkney, Scotland.
